summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Expense Request feature at Lead/Account level. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified expense section presence in both Lead and Account detail pages, modal functionality, and all 5 expense types visible in dropdown.
seed_data_creation: Created test expense requests during backend API testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Expense Request feature fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/expense-types (5 types), POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/expense-requests, PUT /api/expense-requests/{id}/approve. Budget categories no longer have customer-related fields (all requires_lead=False). Free Trial expense type uses SKU grid with auto-calculated MLP from COGS.

Backend API Tests (18 passed).GET /api/expense-types: PASS - Returns exactly 5 expense types: gifting, onboarding, staff_gifting, sponsorship, free_trial
Backend API Tests (18 passed).Expense types structure: PASS - All have id, label, requires_sku fields. Only free_trial requires_sku=True
Backend API Tests (18 passed).POST /api/expense-requests (Gifting for: PASS - Creates draft expense with amount
Backend API Tests (18 passed).POST /api/expense-requests (Free Trial w: PASS - Creates with SKU items and free_trial_days
Backend API Tests (18 passed).GET /api/expense-requests (filtered by l: PASS - Returns expenses for specific lead
Backend API Tests (18 passed).GET /api/expense-requests (filtered by a: PASS - Returns expenses for specific account
Backend API Tests (18 passed).PUT /api/expense-requests/{id}/approve (: PASS - Director can reject with reason
Backend API Tests (18 passed).DELETE /api/expense-requests/{id} (draft: PASS - User can delete own draft
Backend API Tests (18 passed).DELETE /api/expense-requests/{id} (pendi: PASS - User can cancel pending request
Backend API Tests (18 passed).Expense status field: PASS - All statuses valid (draft, pending_approval, approved, rejected, cancelled)
Backend API Tests (18 passed).Expense required fields: PASS - All have id, expense_type, amount, status, created_at, entity_type, entity_id

Frontend UI Tests.Lead Detail page - Expense history table: PASS - Shows Type, Amount, Status, Date columns
Frontend UI Tests.Lead Detail page - Expense modal opens: PASS - Modal shows with title 'New Expense Request'
Frontend UI Tests.Account Detail page - Expense Requests s: PASS - Section visible in Account Detail
Frontend UI Tests.Account Detail page - Expense modal open: PASS - Modal works from Account context
Frontend UI Tests.Status badges: PASS - Draft, Pending Approval, Approved, Rejected, Cancelled all visible with correct colors

budget_categories_verified: Budget categories do NOT have customer-related categories. All 9 categories have requires_lead=False. Categories: event_sponsorship_amount, event_sponsorship_stock, event_participation, setup_exhibit, digital_promotion, marketing_collateral, office_supplies, travel_general, other
